rationale: The two ensures `forall|i|`s have disjoint triggers across runs, so z3 never aligns them; we re-assert each forall with the original triggers, then do a case split on `i == index` (closed by the per-field index ensures) vs `i != index` (closed by transitivity through `pre_self_.page_array@[i]`), and finally lift pointwise `Page` equality to `Seq<Page>` equality via `=~=`.
